note: Rebuilt game engine: generic mode registry + credit-wager wiring + wagered-win bonus XP. core.create_room threads a stake into the mode (escrow on join, pot on verdict); a wagered win grants WIN_XP + min(stake_credits, 200) bonus. Deploy auto-wires the ledger.

creditWager.wired: core + all 7 modes point at the ledger; modes are approved escrow callers; ledger.core = the core above. The 5 new modes were deployed against the existing core on 2026-06-17 (no core redeploy).

supersedes: 2026-06-17 stack core 0x9F4Cb5A8... (no bonus XP), and earlier 0x2d53d797...
